requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and NTON/DGCN Conformity as Baseline for Nicaragua BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619及NTON/DGCN合格认定作为尼加拉瓜BESS项目验收基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619及NTON/DGCN合格認定作為尼加拉瓜BESS項目驗收基準

summary.en: Nicaragua does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to an IEC 62619-mandatory certification route or EU Battery Regulation. Nicaragua's national standards system is administered by MIFIC (Ministerio de Fomento, Industria y Comercio) through DGCN (Dirección General de Calidad), which develops and maintains NTON (Normas Técnicas Obligatorias Nicaragüenses — Nicaraguan Mandatory Technical Norms). NTON norms frequently adopt IEC international standards for electrical and safety requirements, but a specific NTON covering stationary BESS cells and modules had not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date. IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety baseline for lithium BESS cells and modules, and Nicaraguan project owners, EPCs, INE, and ENATREL connection agreements for utility-scale and C&I BESS projects are expected to reference IEC 62619 evidence as a technical prerequisite. IEC 62133 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries) covers smaller format cells and may also be referenced. Exporters should verify current NTON and MIFIC/DGCN conformity requirements directly before shipment.
summary.zh: 尼加拉瓜目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与IEC 62619强制认证路径或欧盟《电池法规》相当。尼加拉瓜国家标准体系由MIFIC（促进、工业和商业部）通过DGCN（质量总局）管理，制定和维护NTON（尼加拉瓜强制技术规范）。NTON规范通常采用IEC国际标准用于电气和安全要求，但截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认专门涵盖固定式BESS电芯和模组的NTON。IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全基准，尼加拉瓜项目业主、EPC承包商、INE及公用事业规模和工商业BESS项目的ENATREL并网协议，预计将以IEC 62619证据作为技术前提。IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）涵盖较小规格电芯，也可能被引用。出口商在出货前应直接核实现行NTON及MIFIC/DGCN合格要求。
summary.zht: 尼加拉瓜目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與IEC 62619強制認證路徑或歐盟《電池法規》相當。尼加拉瓜國家標準體系由MIFIC（促進、工業和商業部）通過DGCN（質量總局）管理，制定和維護NTON（尼加拉瓜強制技術規範）。NTON規範通常採用IEC國際標準用於電氣和安全要求，但截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認專門涵蓋固定式BESS電芯和模組的NTON。IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全基準，尼加拉瓜項目業主、EPC承包商、INE及公用事業規模和工商業BESS項目的ENATREL併網協議，預計將以IEC 62619證據作為技術前提。IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）涵蓋較小規格電芯，也可能被引用。出口商在出貨前應直接核實現行NTON及MIFIC/DGCN合格要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Nicaragua project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
IEC 62133 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (may be referenced for smaller-format cells)
NTON — Normas Técnicas Obligatorias Nicaragüenses (verify current NTON list for BESS-applicable norms via MIFIC/DGCN; no confirmed BESS-specific NTON as of dataset date)
MIFIC/DGCN — Ministerio de Fomento, Industria y Comercio / Dirección General de Calidad — Nicaragua's national standards and conformity assessment authority

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries. The voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not automatically accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Nicaraguan project specifications, NTON norms, or MIFIC/DGCN conformity requirements. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance, and verify whether any MIFIC/DGCN import authorisation or NTON conformity declaration is required before equipment is imported into Nicaragua.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被尼加拉瓜项目规格、NTON规范或MIFIC/DGCN合格要求自动接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据，并核实在设备进口尼加拉瓜前是否需要MIFIC/DGCN进口授权或NTON合格声明。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被尼加拉瓜項目規格、NTON規範或MIFIC/DGCN合格要求自動接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據，並核實在設備進口尼加拉瓜前是否需要MIFIC/DGCN進口授權或NTON合格聲明。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Nicaraguan project owners, INE, and ENATREL connection agreements are expected to reference IEC 62619 as the safety evidence baseline for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify current MIFIC/DGCN NTON list for any BESS-specific mandatory norm that adopts IEC 62619; confirm whether a MIFIC/DGCN import authorisation or conformity declaration is required before equipment enters Nicaragua; (b) obtain IEC 62619:2022 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Nicaragua BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification, INE licence conditions, or ENATREL connection agreement before committing to a test programme; (d) note that Nicaragua's growing renewable sector (geothermal, wind, hydro together represent a majority of the generation mix) is driving demand for grid-stability storage — IEC compliance strengthens bankability and project financing eligibility.
gap.zh: 关键差距：尼加拉瓜项目业主、INE及ENATREL并网协议预计将以IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的安全证据基准。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实现行MIFIC/DGCN NTON清单，确认是否有采用IEC 62619的BESS专项强制规范；确认设备进入尼加拉瓜前是否需要MIFIC/DGCN进口授权或合格声明；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至尼加拉瓜BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619:2022型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格、INE许可条件或ENATREL并网协议中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）注意尼加拉瓜不断增长的可再生能源行业（地热、风能、水电合计占发电结构的多数）正在推动电网稳定储能需求——IEC合规有助于提升可融资性和项目融资资格。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：尼加拉瓜項目業主、INE及ENATREL併網協議預計將以IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的安全證據基準。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實現行MIFIC/DGCN NTON清單，確認是否有採用IEC 62619的BESS專項強制規範；確認設備進入尼加拉瓜前是否需要MIFIC/DGCN進口授權或合格聲明；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至尼加拉瓜BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619:2022型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格、INE許可條件或ENATREL併網協議中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）注意尼加拉瓜不斷增長的可再生能源行業（地熱、風能、水電合計占發電結構的多數）正在推動電網穩定儲能需求——IEC合規有助於提升可融資性和項目融資資格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where INE, ENATREL, or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; NTON/MIFIC/DGCN mandatory regulatory obligation specifically for BESS cells has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with MIFIC/DGCN
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is harmonised with IEC 62619

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation referencing IEC 62619 has been identified for Nicaragua as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Nicaragua project specifications. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Nicaragua project acceptance. Verify MIFIC/DGCN current NTON scope, confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, INE, and ENATREL, and determine whether any import authorisation or conformity declaration is required before shipment into Nicaragua.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，尼加拉瓜尚未确认引用IEC 62619的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是尼加拉瓜项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足尼加拉瓜项目验收要求。核实MIFIC/DGCN现行NTON范围，向项目业主、INE和ENATREL确认IEC 62619证据要求，并确认货物进入尼加拉瓜前是否需要进口授权或合格声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，尼加拉瓜尚未確認引用IEC 62619的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是尼加拉瓜項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足尼加拉瓜項目驗收要求。核實MIFIC/DGCN現行NTON範圍，向項目業主、INE和ENATREL確認IEC 62619證據要求，並確認貨物進入尼加拉瓜前是否需要進口授權或合格聲明。
